nasb.text: Then I sent the hornet before you and it drove out the two kings of the Amorites from before you, but not by your sword or your bow.

esv.text: And I sent the hornet before you, which drove them out before you, the two kings of the Amorites; it was not by your sword or by your bow.

cnv.text: 我派了黃蜂飛在你們前面，把亞摩利人的兩個王從你們面前趕走，並不是用你的刀，也不是用你的弓。

ccb.text: 我差黄蜂飞在你们前面，把亚摩利的两个王从你们面前赶走，没有动用你们一刀一弓。
